Document: court_notice.txt
Model: llama-3.3-70b-versatile
============================================================

## Document Overview
The document is a court notice [3eb7e0b6d3c4] related to a case between M/s TechBuild Constructions Pvt. Ltd. and Mr. Vikram Nair [7f2958eec97d].
  [Evidence: 3eb7e0b6d3c4, 7f2958eec97d]

## Parties Involved
The parties involved are M/s TechBuild Constructions Pvt. Ltd. [7f2958eec97d] and Mr. Vikram Nair [7f2958eec97d].
  [Evidence: 7f2958eec97d]

## Key Dates & Deadlines
The key dates mentioned are June 10, 2023, March 20, 2024, and April 22, 2024 [UNSUPPORTED].

## Financial Terms
The amount of Rs. 14,75,000/- is mentioned as the final installment due on completion of construction [3eb7e0b6d3c4].
  [Evidence: 3eb7e0b6d3c4]

## Key Obligations & Clauses
The lease agreement [6c7ecceb60a5] mentions a lock-in period of 6 months, and the tenant is responsible for paying utilities [6c7ecceb60a5].
  [Evidence: 6c7ecceb60a5]

## Flags & Risk Items
The defendant contends that the work was incomplete/defective [3eb7e0b6d3c4].
  [Evidence: 3eb7e0b6d3c4]

## Recommended Actions
The recommended actions are [UNSUPPORTED].

============================================================
Evidence blocks used: 11

original_text:
============================================================
DRAFT: CASE FACT SUMMARY
Document: internal_memo.txt
Model: llama-3.3-70b-versatile
============================================================

## Document Overview
The document is a Court Notice with a target contract execution date of April 15, 2024 [2d7d5fb335ce].
  [Evidence: 2d7d5fb335ce]

## Parties Involved
The parties involved include Rajesh Mehta, Ananya Sharma, M/s TechBuild Constructions Pvt. Ltd., and Mr. [857306549920, 7f2958eec97d].
  [Evidence: 857306549920, 7f2958eec97d]

## Key Dates & Deadlines
Key dates include April 1, 2024, March 31, 2025, and April 15, 2024 [857306549920, 2d7d5fb335ce].
  [Evidence: 857306549920, 2d7d5fb335ce]

## Financial Terms
The monthly rent is Rs. 22,000/- and the security deposit is Rs. 66,000/- [63ec09f6bf62, ebc26f7dd819].
  [Evidence: 63ec09f6bf62, ebc26f7dd819]

## Key Obligations & Clauses
The tenant shall pay rent by the 5th of each month and the landlord is responsible for major structural repairs [86900ccabd38, f868eb2922e4].
  [Evidence: 86900ccabd38, f868eb2922e4]

## Flags & Risk Items
Flags include [FLAG - UNFAVORABLE], [FLAG - REVIEWNEEDED], and liability cap at 3 months contract value [9e24d5f353a3].
  [Evidence: 9e24d5f353a3]

## Recommended Actions
Recommended actions include negotiating Clause 4.2, Clause 8.1, and obtaining legal sign-off before execution [c5dcd7449c50, 2d7d5fb335ce].
  [Evidence: c5dcd7449c50, 2d7d5fb335ce]

============================================================
Evidence blocks used: 14

original_text:
============================================================
DRAFT: CASE FACT SUMMARY
Document: lease_agreement.txt
Model: llama-3.3-70b-versatile
============================================================

## Document Overview
The document is a Lease Agreement [86900ccabd38] for a residential tenancy, signed on March 15, 2024 [4f879e060157].
  [Evidence: 86900ccabd38, 4f879e060157]

## Parties Involved
The parties involved are Rajesh Mehta, S/O Suresh Mehta (Landlord) and Ananya Sharma (Tenant) [cd1dbbdfe761].
  [Evidence: cd1dbbdfe761]

## Key Dates & Deadlines
The commencement date is April 1, 2024, and the termination date is March 31, 2025 [162c4287aedc].
  [Evidence: 162c4287aedc]

## Financial Terms
The monthly rent is Rs. 22,000/- and the security deposit is Rs. 66,000/- (three months' rent) [162c4287aedc].
  [Evidence: 162c4287aedc]

## Key Obligations & Clauses
The tenant is responsible for minor repairs (below Rs. 500/-) and the landlord is responsible for major structural repairs [86900ccabd38]. The tenant shall not sublet or assign premises without written consent of the landlord [83a08fa9a4f0].
  [Evidence: 86900ccabd38, 83a08fa9a4f0]

## Flags & Risk Items
Late payment attracts a penalty of Rs. 500/- per day [86900ccabd38].
  [Evidence: 86900ccabd38]

## Recommended Actions
[UNSUPPORTED]

============================================================
Evidence blocks used: 16
